timingInterpretationPolicy.guidance: When timingInterpretation.selectedTiming.scopeClass is narrow-hot-path, deltaPercent remains a phase-specific diagnostic. Claimability evaluates timingInterpretation.headlineProcessWall.deltaPercent when that end-to-end metric is available.

workloads.name: matrix-vector multiply 32768x2048 f32 (naive swizzle0)
workloads.description: Matrix-vector compute kernel aligned to Dawn MatrixVectorMultiplyPerf dimensions (Rows=32768, Cols=2048, F32/F32, Impl=Naive, Swizzle=0, 100 dispatches).
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Apples-to-apples matrix-vector contract aligned to Dawn MatrixVectorMultiplyPerf variant geometry and per-dispatch normalization. timingNormalization.note: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (left/right divisors fixed to 1.0).

workloads.name: workgroup-atomic 1024
workloads.description: Workgroup-atomic compute kernel with 1024 workgroups, 100 dispatches per step, matching Dawn WorkgroupAtomicPerf exactly.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Kernel matches Dawn GenWorkgroupWithAtomics (256 threads, 1 atomicStore + 256 atomicLoads per invocation). Both sides dispatch 100 times per step with direct timing (no side-specific divisor scaling). Native Vulkan strict comparable lane currently requires explicit SPIR-V kernel artifacts; this WGSL-kernel workload remains directional until that artifact stage is wired.

timingNormalization.note: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (left/right divisors fixed to 1.0).
